domain: Druze Jabal al-Druze Syrian volcanic plateau (60×30km lava-field plateau in Hauran; Druze refuge under Mamluk + Ottoman pressure; basalt outcrops + narrow defile approaches form natural fortress; 1800m high-ground chokepoint defense; multi-century community persistence via terrain + cohesion)
specific_mechanism: JABAL-DRUZE-CHOKEPOINT-BASIN: chokepoint-angle bounded safety basin alignment-direction constraint for LLM fine-tuning. (1) Define safety basin radius ρ (consistent with AsFT 'narrow safety basin'). (2) Define chokepoint angle θ_c: only updates within angular cone of θ_c relative to canonical alignment direction e_align admitted. (3) ALLOWED update Δθ must satisfy ||Δθ|| < ρ AND angle(Δθ, e_align) < θ_c (combines radius + angular constraint). (4) Basalt-fortress wall: updates outside chokepoint cone REJECTED (zero-clipped). (5) Community-cohesion: per-cluster (semantic-similarity-based grouping) regularization R_cohesion(θ) = Σ_k λ_k ||θ_k − θ̄_k||² strengthens within-cluster cohesion. (6) Differs from pure narrow-basin by adding directional chokepoint cone + community-cohesion per-cluster.
llm_application: JABAL-DRUZE-CHOKEPOINT-BASIN chokepoint angular-cone bounded safety basin + alignment-direction constraint + basalt-fortress reject orthogonal + community-cohesion per-cluster regularization. Differs from R404 SAN-NUM (different — nutrition basin). R420 SIKH-LANGAR (different — community kitchen). R434 ZOU-HUN-BASIN (different). R450 LAAGER-BASIN (different — Boer laager radius-maximization). R460 LEVADE-LIPSCHITZ (different — Lipschitz Levade). R471 CAPOEIRA-GINGA (different — ginga rocking). Differs from AsFT 2506.08473 (closest — narrow safety basin + alignment-direction orthogonal-update penalty), but JABAL adds explicit chokepoint angular cone + basalt-fortress reject + community-cohesion per-cluster. Navigating Safety Landscape 2405.17374 (VISAGE basin depth). ANTIBODY 2603.00498 (flat-loss robust-alignment radius — closest related). Concept Attractors LLMs (different — IFS contraction). Differs by CHOKEPOINT ANGULAR-CONE GATE + BASALT-FORTRESS REJECT + COMMUNITY-COHESION PER-CLUSTER.
novelty_claim: AsFT + Navigating Safety Landscape + ANTIBODY + Concept Attractors cover narrow safety basin + alignment-direction constraint + flat-loss radius paradigm. JABAL-DRUZE-CHOKEPOINT-BASIN adds (a) chokepoint angular cone + (b) basalt-fortress reject + (c) community-cohesion per-cluster regularization. Recombination — borderline lookup.
